content.full_text:
FAIR POLITICAL PRACTICES COMMISSION
P.O. Box 807 • 428 J Street • Sacramento, CA 95812-0807
(916) 322-5660 • Fax (916) 322-0886


August 7, 2000


John E. Malone
Chief Business Officer
School Business Services Division
Vicenti Lloyd Stutzman LLP
2100 A Foothill Boulevard
La Verne CA 91750

Re: Your Request for Advice
Our File No. W-00-159

Dear Mr. Malone:

This is to acknowledge that your request for advice, our file number W-00-159, is withdrawn pursuant to our telephone conversation of July 26, 2000.

Sincerely,

Luisa Menchaca
Assistant-General Counsel

By: Deborah Allison
Staff Counsel

LM:DA:klw
